_comment: User-editable runtime settings. Edit this file in place — it sits next to ToshanVault.App.exe. To override the database location, set Storage.DatabaseFilePath to an ABSOLUTE path (e.g. "D:\\Vault\\vault.db"). When null or empty the app falls back to %LOCALAPPDATA%\ToshanVault\vault.db. The TOSHANVAULT_DATA_DIR environment variable still wins over this file.
